allow: Bash(node -e "const j=JSON.parse\(require\(''''fs''''\).readFileSync\(0,''''utf8''''\)\); console.log\(''''version:'''', j.version||''''NOT FOUND''''\); if\(j.version\) { console.log\(''''RN:'''', JSON.stringify\(j.dependencies||{}\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const r=require; console.log\(''expo:'', r\(''./node_modules/expo/package.json''\).version\); console.log\(''react:'', r\(''./node_modules/react/package.json''\).version\); console.log\(''react-native:'', r\(''./node_modules/react-native/package.json''\).version\); console.log\(''expo-status-bar:'', r\(''./node_modules/expo-status-bar/package.json''\).version\); console.log\(''rn-screens:'', r\(''./node_modules/react-native-screens/package.json''\).version\); console.log\(''rn-safe-area:'', r\(''./node_modules/react-native-safe-area-context/package.json''\).version\);")

Bash(node -e "const chunks=[]; process.stdin.on\(''''data'''',c=>chunks.push\(c\)\); process.stdin.on\(''''end'''',\(\)=>{const j=JSON.parse\(chunks.join\(''''''''\)\); const deps=j.dependencies; const rn=Object.keys\(deps\).filter\(k=>k.includes\(''''react-native-edge''''\)\); console.log\(''''Edge-to-edge \(bundled RN proxy\):''''\); rn.forEach\(k=>console.log\(k,deps[k]\)\); console.log\(''''expo-modules-core:'''', deps[''''expo-modules-core'''']\)}\)")

Bash(node -e "try { const bn=require\(''''./node_modules/expo/bundledNativeModules.json''''\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\({rn:bn[''''react-native''''],react:bn[''''react''''],sa:bn[''''react-native-safe-area-context''''],screens:bn[''''react-native-screens''''],sb:bn[''''expo-status-bar''''],gh:bn[''''react-native-gesture-handler'''']},null,2\)\); } catch\(e\){ console.log\(''''Not found, checking package.json...''''\); const p=require\(''''./node_modules/expo/package.json''''\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\({react:p.dependencies?.react,rn:p.dependencies?.[''''react-native'''']},null,2\)\); }")

Bash(node -e "const r=require; console.log\(''expo:'', r\(''./node_modules/expo/package.json''\).version\); console.log\(''react:'', r\(''./node_modules/react/package.json''\).version\); console.log\(''react-native:'', r\(''./node_modules/react-native/package.json''\).version\); console.log\(''expo-status-bar:'', r\(''./node_modules/expo-status-bar/package.json''\).version\); console.log\(''rn-safe-area-context:'', r\(''./node_modules/react-native-safe-area-context/package.json''\).version\); console.log\(''rn-screens:'', r\(''./node_modules/react-native-screens/package.json''\).version\); console.log\(''rn-gesture-handler:'', r\(''./node_modules/react-native-gesture-handler/package.json''\).version\);")
